650 ENEE - Electrical & Computer Engineering

ENEE686 Charged Particle Dynamics, Electron and lon Beams (3 Credits) General principles of single-particle dynamics; mapping of the electric and magnetic fields; equation of motion and methods of solution; production and control of charge particle beams; electron optics; Liouville’s theorem; space charge effects in high current beams; design principles of special electron and ion beam devices.
